description_long: This is a three-story urban brick house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint. The front facade features large, evenly spaced windows in symmetrical rows and a prominent main entryway with a double door, overhang, and steps leading up from a concrete walkway. The rear and one side of the building are dominated by exterior wooden staircases providing access to upper floors, while the other side is plain with only windows. The building sits on a green lawn base with a concrete path extending from the front and side. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function and accessibility. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from brick, wood, glass, and metal, with interior partition walls visible from above.
description: A three-story brick house with symmetrical windows, a flat roof, and exterior wooden staircases on the back and side. The main entry features double doors, steps, and an overhang.
description_view_0: Front view showing symmetrical windows, the main double-door entryway with steps, and a green lawn with a concrete path.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the exterior wooden staircases spanning all three stories and a plain brick wall with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Side view dominated by the vertical wooden staircases and a mostly blank brick wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with only windows and a long black line, lacking staircases or entry features.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with steps, overhang, and minimal decorative elements
